entry.note: <L>7307<pc>1-0547<k1>asana<k2>asana<h>2 2. {#asana#}¦ <lex>m.</lex> N. eines Baums, {%Terminalia tomentosa W. u. A.%}, <ls>AK. 2,4,2,24.</ls> <ls>H. 1144.</ls> <ls>MED. n. 29.</ls> <ls>R. 2,94,8.</ls> <ls n="R.">4,29,11.</ls> <ls>SUŚR. 1,138,4. 2,64,13. 68,2.</ls> <div n="v">— Vgl. {#aSana#} und {#Asana#} . <LEND>

<L>12349<pc>1-146-b<k1>asana<k2>a/sana<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> {#a/sana#}¦ <div n="1">— 1〉 <lex>n.</lex> {%das Schleudern, Schiessen, Schuss%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 <lex>f.</lex> {#asanA/#} {%Geschoss, Pfeil%}. <LEND>
